cases.description: Explicit poster request triggers the skill
cases.prompt: design a concert poster for a jazz trio
expectations: Produces the design philosophy (markdown, 4-6 paragraphs) before any canvas output
Delivers a single-page PDF or PNG
If fonts are needed, reads from assets/canvas-fonts/

cases.description: Album cover request triggers the skill
cases.prompt: create an album cover for an experimental electronic record
expectations: Visual style reflects the stated genre without naming it literally

cases.description: Editorial design request triggers the skill
cases.prompt: design an editorial spread about Japanese minimalism
expectations: Produces a design philosophy before the canvas
Single-page or multi-page PDF — honors minimalism in composition
Text is sparse, integrated as visual element

cases.description: Animated content does NOT trigger canvas-design
cases.prompt: make an animated loading spinner for Slack
expectations: Routes to slack-gif-creator or algorithmic-art instead
Does NOT produce a static .pdf or .png

cases.description: Data visualization does NOT trigger canvas-design
cases.prompt: plot the revenue breakdown by region as a pie chart
expectations: Does NOT produce a design philosophy markdown
Uses a charting library or data-viz tool
